buildCommand: cd ../.. && pnpm install --frozen-lockfile && pnpm --filter @soropass/core build && pnpm --filter @soropass/ui build && (DOCS_PUBLIC_DIR="$PWD/apps/site/public" pnpm --filter @soropass/matrix matrix:build && DOCS_PUBLIC_DIR="$PWD/apps/site/public" pnpm --filter @soropass/matrix docs:export || echo 'matrix export skipped') && pnpm --filter @soropass/site build
installCommand: echo skip (install runs in buildCommand at repo root)
